options.name: -early
options.description: Specifies the mode for which slack is to be reported.

options.name: -fall
options.description: Specifies the transition for which slack is to be reported.

options.name: -late
options.description: Specifies the mode for which slack is to be reported.

options.name: -max_slack
options.description: Upper bound for the slack to be reported.

options.name: -min_slack
options.description: lower bound for the slack to be reported.

options.name: -rise
options.description: Specifies the transition for which slack is to be reported.

options.name: -view
options.description: View for which slack is to be reported. Default is worst of all views (string, optional) > <file_name[.gz]> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <file_name[.gz]> # Redirect output to file
